final:
module convolutional_encoder (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input data_in,
    output reg [1:0] data_out
);
    reg [2:0] unused_shift_reg; // 3-bit shift register for the encoder

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            unused_shift_reg <= 3'b000;
            data_out <= 2'b00;
        end else begin
            unused_shift_reg <= {data_in, unused_shift_reg[2:1]}; // Shift in the new data
            data_out <= {unused_shift_reg[2] ^ unused_shift_reg[1] ^ unused_shift_reg[0], // Output 1
                          unused_shift_reg[2] ^ unused_shift_reg[0]}; // Output 2
        end
    end
endmodule
